text: Generative Artificial Intelligence in the Higher Education Institution: An Empirical Study of the University of Guayaquil This paper aims to respond to the research question: what is the reality of the integration of GAI in the higher education institution, specifically in the University of Guayaquil? In particular, the purpose of this study was to determine the GAI tools used by lecturers, the advantages and obstacles of the use of GAI tools, and to know the level of integration of GAI tools and pedagogical applications at the University of Guayaquil. A mixed method research design was used which incorporated a literature review, online surveys of 334 lecturers from different colleges and schools within the institution. The results showed that there is no uniformity in relation to the GAI tools that are currently being used in the University, although ChatGPT is the one that has stood out the most among lecturers. The applications provided by these tools, as reflected in the responses of the sample, determine their relevance and the difficulties faced when they are used. Thus, it was possible to verify the adoption of innovative teaching tools for students, and the simplification of pedagogical tasks for lecturers; on the other hand, negative opinions were expressed in relation to the reactions of the institution, lack of preparation of lecturers and issues related to pedagogical responsibility. Finally, the potentialities and perspectives of the use of GAI in higher education institutions are indicated, with the need for strategic planning by institutions to facilitate the appropriate integration of GAI and its pedagogical applications, as well as to establish training for lecturers in the use of GAI tools and pedagogical applications as well as guidelines on pedagogical ethics.
